query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `compliance_evidence_files` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `control_type` enum('soc2','iso27001') NOT NULL,
  `control_id` int NOT NULL,
  `file_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `file_url` text NOT NULL,
  `file_key` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `mime_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `uploaded_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `uploaded_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_evidence_control` (`control_type`, `control_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

ALTER TABLE `soc2_controls` 
  MODIFY COLUMN `owner_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `testing_frequency` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL;

ALTER TABLE `iso27001_controls`
  MODIFY COLUMN `owner_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `testing_frequency` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL;
